---
title: "Online Books"
---

My summaries on what I have learned on econometrics and causal inference.

### [Econometrics Guide](https://xiangao.github.io/econometrics-guide/)

A practical guide to applied econometrics with examples in R and Stata.

### [Topics on econometrics and causal inference](https://xiangao.github.io/blog_book/)

Collected notes and posts on applied econometrics and causal inference, compiled into book format.

### [Causal Econometrics Guide](https://xiangao.github.io/causal_econometrics_guide/)

A guide to modern causal inference methods for applied researchers.

### [Causal Econometrics in Julia](https://xiangao.github.io/causal_econometrics_julia/)

A hands-on guide to causal inference and econometrics using Julia, covering identification, estimation, difference-in-differences, instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, and mediation analysis.
